title: National Infrastructure Commission Annual Report and Accounts 2024-2025
body: "This is the Commission’s ninth and final annual report and accounts. It details the organisation’s main activities and performance in 2024-25.  It includes the audited accounts and financial statements for the period 1 April 2024 to 31 March 2025.  This publication is separate from the Commission’s annual monitoring report on the Government’s progress in delivering infrastructure projects. "
